scope: Pass B full-surface expansion, researched directly against the live YouTube Data API v3 reference (developers.google.com/youtube/v3/docs/*). The API publishes 19 resource types (Activities, Captions, ChannelBanners, ChannelSections, Channels, Comments, CommentThreads, I18nLanguages, I18nRegions, Members, MembershipsLevels, PlaylistItems, Playlists, Search, Subscriptions, Thumbnails, VideoAbuseReportReasons, VideoCategories, Videos, Watermarks) across list/insert/update/delete methods. This pass keeps the 3 legacy-parity streams unchanged (channels, videos, playlists) and adds 6 new read streams reachable with API-key-only auth (playlist_items via fan_out over config.playlist_ids, comment_threads via fan_out over config.video_ids, search scoped to type=video, video_categories, i18n_regions, i18n_languages). Every insert/update/delete method across every resource (videos.insert/update/delete, playlists.insert/update/delete, playlistItems.insert/update/delete, comments.insert/update/delete, commentThreads.insert, channels.update, subscriptions.insert/delete, captions.insert/update/delete, channelSections.insert/update/delete, thumbnails.set, channelBanners.insert, watermarks.set/unset) requires OAuth2 user authorization against the target YouTube channel's own data — this connector's spec.json declares only an api_key (no oauth2 client_id/client_secret/refresh_token), so no write action is expressible with the auth this bundle actually has; adding OAuth2 would be a real scope change to the connector's credential model, not a Pass B declarative addition (see docs.md's Known limits — this is an AUTH_COMPLEX-class blocker, not a silent omission). Activities, Members, MembershipsLevels, and Subscriptions are further scoped out as requiring OAuth2 even to LIST (they enumerate the authenticated user's own channel activity/membership/subscription data, not public content).

excluded.reason: channels.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the target channel owner's account; this bundle has only api_key auth, no OAuth2 credential surface
videos.insert uploads a video file and requires OAuth2 authorization against the uploading channel; also a multipart/resumable-upload body, not a plain JSON create
videos.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner's channel; this bundle has only api_key auth
videos.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner's channel; this bundle has only api_key auth
rates a video (like/dislike/none) on behalf of the authenticated user; requires OAuth2
retrieves the authenticated user's own rating for a video; requires OAuth2, not public data
reports a video for abuse on behalf of the authenticated user; requires OAuth2
playlists.insert requires OAuth2 authorization against the creating channel; this bundle has only api_key auth
playlists.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the playlist owner's channel
playlists.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the playlist owner's channel
playlistItems.insert (adds a video to a playlist) requires OAuth2 authorization against the playlist owner's channel
playlistItems.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the playlist owner's channel
playlistItems.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the playlist owner's channel
commentThreads.insert (posts a new top-level comment) requires OAuth2 authorization against the commenting user's account
individual comment/reply list, a narrower cut below the comment_threads level (each thread already embeds its top-level comment); Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage on the reply-fan-out sub-resource
comments.insert (posts a reply) requires OAuth2 authorization against the commenting user's account
comments.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the comment author's account
comments.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the comment author's account or channel owner
flags a comment as spam on behalf of the channel owner; requires OAuth2
sets a comment's moderation status; requires OAuth2 authorization as the channel owner/moderator
static enum-value reference list (abuse report reason codes) consumed only by the videos.reportAbuse write, itself excluded as requiring OAuth2; low standalone value, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage

activities.list, when scoped to "mine", requires OAuth2; the channelId-scoped public variant returns a real feed but is a narrower, lower-value cut of data already reachable via videos/playlistItems/search, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
members.list enumerates a channel's paying members and requires OAuth2 authorization as the channel owner; not public data
membershipsLevels.list enumerates a channel's membership pricing tiers and requires OAuth2 authorization as the channel owner; not public data

subscriptions.list (a user's own channel subscriptions), when scoped to "mine", requires OAuth2; the channelId-scoped public variant is a narrower, lower-value cut of channel relationship data, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
subscriptions.insert subscribes the authenticated user to a channel; requires OAuth2
subscriptions.delete unsubscribes the authenticated user from a channel; requires OAuth2
captions.list requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner's channel (caption tracks are not public metadata even for public videos)
captions.insert uploads a caption track file; also requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner's channel
captions.update replaces a caption track file; also requires OAuth2
captions.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner's channel
captions.download retrieves the actual caption track file, not a JSON record; also requires OAuth2

channelSections.list (a channel's own curated homepage sections), when scoped to "mine", requires OAuth2; the channelId-scoped public variant is a narrow presentation-layer resource, Pass B breadth-vs-cost triage
channelSections.insert requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
channelSections.update requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
channelSections.delete requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
uploads a channel banner image file; also requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
uploads a custom video thumbnail image file; also requires OAuth2 authorization against the video owner
sets a channel's video watermark image; also requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
removes a channel's video watermark; requires OAuth2 authorization against the channel owner
